---
title:  
    "nef deletions in EXPIII"
date: 
    "Oct 31st, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---


```{r}

library(RColorBrewer)
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(rstatix)
library(effsize)
library(purrr)
library(ggpubr)

```

```{r read-in variant data}

# set working directory
if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
    print("Remote HPC Connection!")
    wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
    print("Local PC Connection!")
    wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load variant data
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/reductive-evolution/readin_data.R"))

```

```{r load visualization settings}

# load visual settings
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/reductive-evolution/plot_custom.R"))


```

```{r}


nef_deletions <- read.table(file = paste0(wd,"results/tables/misc/nef_deletions.tsv"), sep = "", header = T)

nef_deletions %<>% 
    mutate(length = end - start + 1,
    right_vf = 1 - coverage_after_start/coverage_before_start,
    left_vf = 1 - coverage_before_end/coverage_after_end,
    deletion_id = paste0(exp_line, ":", deletion_id)) %>%
    mutate(consensus_vf = rowMeans(select(.,right_vf, left_vf), na.rm = T),
    deletion_name = paste0(length, ":", start, "_", end),
    deletion_id = as.factor(deletion_id)) 


nef_deletions_extended <- nef_deletions

for (del in levels(nef_deletions$deletion_id)){
    max_record <- max(nef_deletions$passage[nef_deletions$deletion_id == del])
    next_psgs <- seq(max_record,end_psg,10)
    row_to_repeat <- nef_deletions[nef_deletions$deletion_id == del & nef_deletions$passage == max_record,]
    repeated_df <- bind_rows(replicate(length(next_psgs), row_to_repeat, simplify = FALSE))
    repeated_df$passage <- next_psgs
    nef_deletions_extended <- rbind(nef_deletions_extended, repeated_df)
}

nef_deletions_extended$line_type <- "solid"

for (del in levels(nef_deletions_extended$deletion_id)){
    min_record <- min(nef_deletions_extended$passage[nef_deletions_extended$deletion_id == del])
    prev_psgs <- seq(10,min_record,10)
    row_to_repeat <- nef_deletions_extended[nef_deletions_extended$deletion_id == del & nef_deletions_extended$passage == min_record,]
    repeated_df <- bind_rows(replicate(length(prev_psgs), row_to_repeat, simplify = FALSE))
    repeated_df$passage <- prev_psgs
    repeated_df$consensus_vf[1:(length(prev_psgs)-1)] <- 0
    repeated_df$line_type <- "dashed"
    nef_deletions_extended <- rbind(nef_deletions_extended, repeated_df)
}


nef_deletions_extended$line_type <- factor(nef_deletions_extended$line_type, levels = c("solid", "dashed"))


vec <- nef_deletions_extended$deletion_name
names(vec) <- nef_deletions_extended$deletion_id
vec <- vec[!duplicated(vec)]


nef_deletions_extended$deletion_name <- factor(nef_deletions_extended$deletion_name, levels = as.character(vec))
color_set <- grDevices::colors()[grep('gr(a|e)y', grDevices::colors(), invert = T)]
set.seed(-2)
legend_colors <- setNames(sample(color_set, length(levels(nef_deletions_extended$deletion_name))), levels(nef_deletions_extended$deletion_name))


fig <- nef_deletions_extended %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = consensus_vf, color = deletion_name, linetype = line_type)) + 
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    geom_line(size = 2) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(seq(0,end_psg, 50), 630)) +
    labs(x="Transfer", y= "Deletion frequency",  color = "Deletion ID", title = "") +
    scale_color_manual(values = legend_colors) +
    custom_plot_theme(application = "publication") +
    guides(linetype = "none")





# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig,  "nef_deletion_freq.pdf", height = 14, width = 21)
```


```{r time to fixation of deletions}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
t_2_f <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in exp_line_factor){
    nef_deletions_extended_sub <- nef_deletions_extended[nef_deletions_extended$exp_line == exp_line,] #& variants_expiii$genomic_pos >= 8787 & variants_expiii$genomic_pos <= 9400
    deletion_ids <- unique(nef_deletions_extended_sub$deletion_id[nef_deletions_extended_sub$consensus_vf >= 0.99 & nef_deletions_extended_sub$passage == end_psg])
    for (id in deletion_ids){
        nef_deletions_extended_sub2 <- nef_deletions_extended_sub[nef_deletions_extended_sub$deletion_id == id,]
        fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(nef_deletions_extended_sub$passage[nef_deletions_extended_sub$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_extended_sub$consensus_vf >= 0.95])))
        appearance <- max(setdiff(seq(0,fixation,10), as.numeric(as.vector(unique(nef_deletions_extended_sub2$passage[(nef_deletions_extended_sub2$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_extended_sub2$consensus_vf >= 0.01)]))))) + 10
        disappearance_vec <- as.numeric(as.vector(nef_deletions_extended_sub$passage[nef_deletions_extended_sub$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_extended_sub$consensus_vf < 0.05]))
        disappearance <- ifelse(length(disappearance_vec[disappearance_vec > fixation]) == 0, NA, min(disappearance_vec[disappearance_vec > fixation]))
        length <- unique(nef_deletions_extended_sub2$length)
        deletion_name <- unique(as.character(nef_deletions_extended_sub2$deletion_name))
        t_2_f <- rbind(t_2_f, c(exp_line, id, deletion_name, length, appearance, fixation, disappearance, fixation-appearance))
    }
}


# set column names and right data types
t_2_f %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "deletion_id", "deletion_name", "length", "appearance", "fixation", "disappearance","time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(c(4,5,6,8), as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        host_line = if_else(str_detect(exp_line, pattern = "MT-2"), "MT-2", "MT-4"))

jpos_points <- position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)



fig <- ggplot(t_2_f, aes(x = "", y = time_to_fixation)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.3, linewidth = 1.5, size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 150, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 160, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(x="", y= "Time to fixation") +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = deletion_name, size = length), position = jpos_points, alpha = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,300, 50)) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(5, 15), name = "Length") +
    scale_color_manual(values = legend_colors) +
    guides(color = "none") +
    custom_plot_theme(application = "publication")

# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig,  "nef_del_dist_time_to_fix.pdf", height = 14, width = 10.5)


```


```{r calculate time to fixation for substitutions}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
t_2_f_sbs <- data.frame()


for (exp_line in exp_line_factor){
    variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == exp_line,] #& variants_expiii$genomic_pos >= 8787 & variants_expiii$genomic_pos <= 9400
    fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_psg])
    for (mut in fixed_muts){
        variants_expiii_sub2 <- variants_expiii_sub[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut,]
        fixation <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99])))
        appearance <- max(setdiff(seq(0,fixation,10), as.numeric(as.vector(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$passage[(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.01)]))))) + 10
        disappearance_vec <- as.numeric(as.vector(variants_expiii_sub$passage[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq < 0.5]))
        disappearance <- ifelse(length(disappearance_vec[disappearance_vec > fixation]) == 0, NA, min(disappearance_vec[disappearance_vec > fixation]))
        translational_impact <- unique(as.character(variants_expiii_sub$effect_simplified[variants_expiii_sub$mut_info == mut]))
        t_2_f_sbs <- rbind(t_2_f_sbs, c(exp_line, mut, translational_impact, appearance, fixation, disappearance, fixation-appearance))
    }
}


# set column names and right data types
t_2_f_sbs %<>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "mut_info", "effect_simplified", "appearance", "fixation", "disappearance","time_to_fixation")) %>% 
        mutate_at(c(4,5,7), as.integer) %>%
        mutate(exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
        host_line = if_else(str_detect(exp_line, pattern = "MT-2"), "MT-2", "MT-4"),
        effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts))

t_2_f_sbs[!is.na(t_2_f_sbs$disappearance),]
aa <- t_2_f_sbs$mut_info[!is.na(t_2_f_sbs$disappearance)]

# average time to fixation for fixated mutations based on how many times they are repeated

fix_count_table <- table(variants_expiii$mut_info[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii$passage == end_psg])



fix_count_table_list <- list("4" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==4],
    "3" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==3],
    "2" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==2],
    "1" = fix_count_table[fix_count_table==1])

sum(fix_count_table_list[[4]]) + sum(fix_count_table_list[[3]]) + sum(fix_count_table_list[[2]]) + sum(fix_count_table_list[[1]])




t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence <- NA
t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence[t_2_f_sbs$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["1"]])] <- "1 out of 4"
t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence[t_2_f_sbs$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["2"]])] <- "2 out of 4"
t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence[t_2_f_sbs$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["3"]])] <- "3 out of 4"
t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence[t_2_f_sbs$mut_info %in% names(fix_count_table_list[["4"]])] <- "4 out of 4"
t_2_f_sbs <- t_2_f_sbs[!is.na(t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence),]
t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence <- factor(t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence, levels = c("1 out of 4", "2 out of 4", "3 out of 4", "4 out of 4"))


wilcox.test(t_2_f$time_to_fixation[t_2_f$length >= 50], t_2_f_sbs$time_to_fixation[t_2_f_sbs$Occurrence == "1 out of 4"])


```

```{r initial relative fitness, comparison between short and large deletions}

initial_rel_fitness <- function(t1, af1, t2, af2) {
    rel_fit <- (1/(3*(t2-t1)))*(log(af2/(1-af2))-log(af1/(1-af1)))
    return(rel_fit)
}

# record at what passages the fixed mutations first appeared and reached fixation (AF above 0.99)
df <- data.frame()

for (exp_line in exp_line_factor){
    nef_deletions_sub <- nef_deletions[nef_deletions$exp_line == exp_line,]
    
    for (id in unique(as.character(nef_deletions_sub$deletion_id))){
        print(id)
        appearance_psg <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(nef_deletions_sub$passage[nef_deletions_sub$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_sub$consensus_vf >= 0.01]))) #  & variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.01
        freq_appearance <- nef_deletions_sub$consensus_vf[nef_deletions_sub$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_sub$passage == appearance_psg]
        ten_percent_psg <- min(as.numeric(as.vector(nef_deletions_sub$passage[nef_deletions_sub$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_sub$consensus_vf >= 0.1])))
        freq_ten_percent <- nef_deletions_sub$consensus_vf[nef_deletions_sub$deletion_id == id & nef_deletions_sub$passage == ten_percent_psg]
        


        init_rel_fit <- initial_rel_fitness(appearance_psg, freq_appearance, ten_percent_psg, freq_ten_percent)

        len <- unique(nef_deletions_sub$length[nef_deletions_sub$deletion_id == id])
        df <- rbind(df, c(exp_line, id, len,appearance_psg, freq_appearance, ten_percent_psg, freq_ten_percent, init_rel_fit))
        
    }
}


# set column names and right data types
df2 <- df %>% set_colnames(c("exp_line", "deletion_id", "length", "appearance_psg", "freq_appearance", "ten_percent_psg", "freq_ten_percent", "init_rel_fit")) %>% 
        mutate_at(3:8, as.numeric) %>%
        filter(!is.nan(init_rel_fit))

df2$group <- ifelse(df2$length >= 50, "Long \n(> 50bp del)", "Short \n(<= 50bp del)")

tt <- t.test(
    init_rel_fit ~ group,
    data = df2
)

# Compute y position for annotation
y_pos <- max(df2$init_rel_fit, na.rm = TRUE)

fig <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = group, y = init_rel_fit, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 1.5,
        y = y_pos,
        label = paste0(
        "t-test p = ", signif(tt$p.value, 3), "\n",
        "mean(Long) = ", round(tt$estimate[1], 2), "\n",
        "mean(Short) = ", round(tt$estimate[2], 2)
        ),
        size = 6
    ) +
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Initial relative fitness",
        title = "Time to majority by deletion length",
        fill = "Group"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    custom_plot_theme(application = "publication") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())


# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig,  "nef_del_length_vs_initial_rel_fitness_boxplot.pdf", height = 14, width = 14)


```
